response:
Here are comprehensive unit tests for the `is_valid_email` function using pytest style. The tests cover happy paths, edge cases, and error cases:

```python
import pytest
from your_module import is_valid_email  # Replace 'your_module' with the actual module name

class TestIsValidEmail:
    """Test cases for is_valid_email function."""

    # Happy path tests
    def test_valid_simple_email(self):
        """Test a simple valid email address."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_dots(self):
        """Test email with dots in local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("john.doe@example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_underscore(self):
        """Test email with underscore in local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user_name@example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_percent(self):
        """Test email with percent sign in local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user%name@example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_plus(self):
        """Test email with plus sign in local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user+name@example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_hyphen(self):
        """Test email with hyphen in domain part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@sub-domain.example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_subdomain(self):
        """Test email with multiple subdomains."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@mail.sub.example.com") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_long_tld(self):
        """Test email with long top-level domain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.technology") is True

    def test_valid_email_with_numbers(self):
        """Test email with numbers in local and domain parts."""
        assert is_valid_email("user123@domain456.com") is True

    # Edge cases
    def test_email_with_single_letter_local_part(self):
        """Test email with single letter local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("a@b.co") is True

    def test_email_with_single_letter_domain(self):
        """Test email with single letter domain part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@x.y") is True

    def test_email_with_max_length_local_part(self):
        """Test email with maximum length local part (64 chars)."""
        local_part = "a" * 64
        assert is_valid_email(f"{local_part}@example.com") is True

    def test_email_with_max_length_domain(self):
        """Test email with maximum length domain (255 chars total)."""
        # 64 chars local + 1 @ + 189 chars domain (63 + 1 + 123 + 1 + 3)
        domain = "a" * 63 + "." + "b" * 123 + ".com"
        assert is_valid_email(f"user@{domain}") is True

    def test_email_with_minimum_tld_length(self):
        """Test email with minimum TLD length (2 chars)."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.co") is True

    # Error cases
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test empty string input."""
        assert is_valid_email("") is False

    def test_missing_at_symbol(self):
        """Test email missing @ symbol."""
        assert is_valid_email("userexample.com") is False

    def test_missing_domain_part(self):
        """Test email missing domain part after @."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@") is False

    def test_missing_local_part(self):
        """Test email missing local part before @."""
        assert is_valid_email("@example.com") is False

    def test_invalid_characters_in_local_part(self):
        """Test email with invalid characters in local part."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@name@example.com") is False
        assert is_valid_email("user name@example.com") is False
        assert is_valid_email("user<name>@example.com") is False

    def test_invalid_characters_in_domain(self):
        """Test email with invalid characters in domain."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@exa mple.com") is False
        assert is_valid_email("user@exa@mple.com") is False
        assert is_valid_email("user@exa[mple.com") is False

    def test_invalid_tld(self):
        """Test email with invalid TLD."""
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.c") is False  # TLD too short
        assert is_valid_email("user@example.123") is False  # TLD with numbers
